name: Civil Rights Movement Timeline
description: Create a 2-page visual timeline of the Civil Rights Movement in ActivInspire. The first page must contain the title 'Civil Rights Movement Timeline' and the subtitle '1954-1968'. The second page should feature a horizontal timeline axis with at least 5 shape markers and text labels for these events: Brown v. Board of Education (1954), Montgomery Bus Boycott (1955), March on Washington (1963), Civil Rights Act (1964), and Voting Rights Act (1965). Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/civil_rights_timeline.flipchart.
